description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 28-31.

Challenging Roar

Starting at 23rd level, your challenging presence is impossible to ignore, even for legends. As a bonus action, you can unleash a primal roar. Each creature of your choice within 30 feet must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw against a DC equal to your Strength score or be frightened of you for 1 minute. A frightened creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Creatures immune to the frightened condition must make this saving throw regardless. On a failure, the

creature is beckoned by your challenge and compelled to attack you until the end of its next turn. While compelled in this way, a creature cannot make attack rolls against a creature other than you if you are within range and a valid target. If the creature cannot reach you with its attacks or is otherwise unable to damage you, it may target another creature instead.

LP Cost. You can use this feature at the end of another creature’s turn by expending 1 Legendary Point.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
